input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "for path in /ready /readiness /healthz /live /; do printf '%s ' \""'$path"; curl -sS -o /tmp/sreft_probe_body -w '"'%{http_code}\\n' --max-time 2 \"http://localhost:8083"'$path"; head -c 120 /tmp/sreft_probe_body; printf '"'\\n'; done"

/bin/zsh -lc "for p in /ready /readiness /healthz /live /; do printf '%s ' \""'$p"; /usr/bin/curl -sS -o /tmp/sreft_probe_body -w '"'%{http_code}\\n' --max-time 2 \"http://localhost:8083"'$p"; /usr/bin/head -c 120 /tmp/sreft_probe_body; printf '"'\\n'; done"
/bin/zsh -lc "for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do /usr/bin/curl -sS -o /tmp/sreft_order_body -w '%{http_code} ' --max-time 2 http://localhost:8083/orders; /bin/cat /tmp/sreft_order_body; printf '\\n'; done"
